_help: Machine config read by the modernize-flow / jsp2react scripts via --project (with CLI/env fallbacks). Copy this, fill it for your app, and point scripts at it. status.md §Project Config mirrors these values for humans; this file is the one the scripts parse. Field docs: SETUP.md §5 and springboot-target-kit/SKILL.md. A worked example: examples/baa.project.json.
